generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance GantryPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Industrial position encoder for tracking gantry crane coordinates (bridge, trolley, hook) with high precision. Interfaces with embedded controller via industrial I/O modules."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GantryPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneLoadCell : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Load cell sensor for measuring container weight and swinging motion dynamics. Integrated with Raspberry Pi for real-time data acquisition."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneLoadDataTransmitted
]

instance AirQualityCO2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "CO2 concentration sensor deployed on Raspberry Pi for real-time environmental monitoring in Air Quality Management exemplar."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualityCO2DataTransmitted
]

instance AirQualityParticulateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Particulate matter sensor (e.g., PM2.5/PM10) for indoor air quality monitoring using Raspberry Pi-based data acquisition."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualityParticulateDataTransmitted
]

instance GreenhouseEnvironmentalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Generic environmental sensor suite (temperature, humidity, light) for GreenhouseDT behavioral adaptation, though specific sensor types are not detailed."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GreenhouseEnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance GantryPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GantryPositionEncoder
    base:desc "Real-time position data (coordinates, velocity, acceleration) transmitted via MQTT/TCP/IP at high frequency (10-100Hz) for trajectory validation."
]

instance CraneLoadDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneLoadCell
    base:desc "Load and swinging motion data transmitted continuously or event-triggered (e.g., puck pick/drop) for fault detection and control refinement."
]

instance AirQualityCO2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirQualityCO2Sensor
    base:desc "CO2 concentration measurements streamed via MQTT to digital twin for runtime visualization and predictive analytics."
]

instance AirQualityParticulateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirQualityParticulateSensor
    base:desc "Particulate matter data transmitted in real-time for air quality prediction and simulation inputs."
]

instance GreenhouseEnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GreenhouseEnvironmentalSensor
    base:desc "Environmental parameters transmitted via ActiveMQ for behavioral adaptation synchronization between physical greenhouse and digital twin."
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Mathematical kinematic model using Denavit-Hartenberg parameters for gantry crane motion representation. Developed in MATLAB/Simulink and Python (PyRobot/URDF)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PhysicsSimulationEnabler, ControlSimulationEnabler
]

instance RigidBodyDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Physics-based rigid-body dynamics model implemented with Bullet Physics/ODE for real-time validation of kinematic predictions."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PhysicsSimulationEnabler
]

instance AutomationMLAirQualityModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering representation of air quality system using AutomationML for structured simulation and prediction pipelines."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzureSimulationEnabler
]

instance TimeSeriesSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw time-series sensor data (position, load, environmental) stored in TimescaleDB/PostgreSQL for historical analysis and fault detection."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GantryPositionDataTransmitted, CraneLoadDataTransmitted, GreenhouseEnvironmentalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DatabaseLoggingEnabler
]

instance PreprocessedTrajectoryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Filtered and normalized trajectory data (e.g., Kalman-filtered swinging motion) synchronized for continuous validation services."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GantryPositionDataTransmitted, CraneLoadDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ContinuousValidationService
]

instance AirQualityPredictionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed air quality measurements used for runtime simulation and predictive analytics in Microsoft Azure pipelines."
    DTDFVocab:fromData AirQualityCO2DataTransmitted, AirQualityParticulateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzureSimulationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance PhysicsSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation engine using Bullet Physics/ODE in Gazebo for real-time rigid-body dynamics validation of crane kinematics."
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance ControlSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Optimal control simulation framework using MATLAB/Simulink or Python (Pyomo/CasADi) for trajectory planning and adaptive control."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance DatabaseLoggingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database system (TimescaleDB/PostgreSQL) for storing sensor data and actuator commands with Git/SVN version control for model evolution."
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Lightweight MQTT broker for asynchronous, event-driven communication between physical crane and digital twin services."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, DataVisualizationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance AzureSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microsoft Azure-based simulation pipeline for air quality prediction and runtime visualization using AutomationML models."
    DTDFVocab:enables AirQualitySimulationService
]

instance ROS2FrameworkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 (ROS 2) for modular service development and interoperability between crane control components."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance DarTwinNotationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom DarTwin notation for documenting system evolution, including model updates, service additions, and configuration changes."
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemEvolutionService
]

// C6: Services
instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time optimization service computing energy-efficient trajectories and collision avoidance policies. Integrates with physical controller via ROS 2/MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight, AdaptiveControlAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Time-series data storage and operational analytics service logging sensor/actuator data for post-mortem analysis and performance benchmarking."
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalTrendInsight, FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time and historical visualization service displaying 3D CAD models synchronized with sensor data for educational demonstrations."
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneStateInsight, InteractiveDashboardAction
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model-plant synchronization service comparing digital twin predictions with physical measurements using statistical methods (Kalman filtering, residual analysis)."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelValidationInsight, RecalibrationAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance service monitoring sensor/control signals for abnormal patterns using machine learning (Isolation Forest, SVM) or rule-based thresholds."
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDiagnosisInsight, AlertAction
]

instance AirQualitySimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Runtime simulation and prediction service for indoor air quality using Azure-based AutomationML models."
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityForecastInsight, AdaptiveVentilationAction
]

instance SystemEvolutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Meta-modeling service tracking digital twin evolution via DarTwin notation for version control of models and services."
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemChangeInsight, ConfigurationUpdateAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Computed optimal trajectories for energy-efficient crane motion with collision avoidance guarantees."
]

instance AdaptiveControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic refinement of actuator commands based on real-time digital twin predictions."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OperationalTrendInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected trends in crane operational data (e.g., wear patterns, efficiency metrics) for maintenance planning."
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identified anomalies in sensor/control signals (e.g., encoder failures, load imbalances) with root cause analysis."
]

instance ModelValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation metrics comparing digital twin predictions with physical measurements (e.g., RMSE, residual analysis)."
]

instance RecalibrationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated recalibration of digital twin models based on validation discrepancies."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CraneStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane state (position, velocity, load) synchronized with 3D CAD model."
]

instance InteractiveDashboardAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "User-triggered visualization adjustments for debugging or educational demonstrations."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AirQualityForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted air quality metrics (CO2, particulate levels) with confidence intervals for indoor environment management."
]

instance AdaptiveVentilationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of ventilation systems based on real-time air quality predictions."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SystemChangeInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Documented changes in digital twin (e.g., updated CAD models, new control algorithms) via DarTwin notation."
]

instance FaultDiagnosisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Classified crane faults (e.g., motor stalls, encoder failures) with severity assessment."
]

instance AlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggered alerts for maintenance teams upon fault detection."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ConfigurationUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Applied configuration changes to digital twin services based on evolution tracking."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance CraneActuatorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded controller interfacing with crane motors and encoders for closed-loop control. Receives refined commands from OptimalControlService via ROS 2/MQTT."
]

instance VentilationSystemActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC system actuators in Air Quality Management exemplar, adjusted automatically based on digital twin predictions."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The **Virtual-to-Physical Interaction** in this Digital Twin system is mediated by the **Control Application** and **Physical Crane Interface**, with the following technical specifics:
  - **Command Types**: Generated by the **Trajectory Generator Service**, which produces **optimal movement trajectories** (e.g., smooth, jerk-limited paths) to minimize residual swinging motion of the puck. Commands include:
    - **Position/Velocity Setpoints**: Cartesian or joint-space trajectories for the gantry, trolley, and hook.
    - **Controller Parameters**: PID gains or adaptive control signals for the crane’s motors.
  - **Control Message Formats**: Likely **structured JSON or binary protocols** (e.g., ROS messages or custom TCP/IP payloads) transmitted via the **Physical Crane Interface** to the crane’s controllers.
  - **Validation and Authentication Mechanisms**: Not explicitly stated, but inferred to include:
    - **Trajectory Validation**: The **Continuous Validation Service** compares executed trajectories (physical) with simulated ones (digital) using **distance metrics** (e.g., Euclidean error in position/velocity). If thresholds (e.g., ±5% deviation) are breached, alerts are triggered via the **Dashboard**.
    - **Command Integrity**: Implicitly ensured by the **Control Application**’s reliance on validated trajectories from the **Trajectory Generator Service**.
  - **Feedback Systems**: Closed-loop control is implied, with the **Physical Crane Interface** relaying real-time sensor data (e.g., actual position/velocity) back to the **Control Application** for adaptive adjustments.
  - **Conflict Resolution**: Not explicitly detailed, but the **MQTT Broker** may prioritize messages (e.g., emergency stops override trajectory commands) or implement **last-write-wins** semantics for concurrent updates.
  - **Command Execution Confirmation**: Likely achieved via **acknowledgment messages** (e.g., MQTT QoS 1/2) or **state synchronization** between the **Control Application** and **Physical Crane Interface**, ensuring commands are executed as intended."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin constellation in the provided exemplars follows an **ad-hoc, lightweight orchestration pattern** without reliance on commercial frameworks. GreenhouseDT and Air Quality Management exemplify **loosely coupled architectures** using **containerization/virtualization** (e.g., virtual machines with pre-recorded data in GreenhouseDT) and **message brokers (ActiveMQ)** for inter-component communication. Resource management is decentralized, with **Raspberry Pi-based sensor nodes** handling localized data collection and processing. The Air Quality Management exemplar further integrates **AutomationML-based digital twins** and **Microsoft Azure tools**, indicating a hybrid cloud-edge orchestration. The lab-scale gantry crane’s C4-based architecture suggests a **context-aware, containerized deployment**, though no explicit coordination protocols (e.g., consensus, leader election) are described. The overall pattern emphasizes **domain-specific adaptability** over standardized frameworks."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar emphasizes **self-adaptive behavioral models**, implying dynamic fidelity adjustments to align the digital twin with the physical system’s evolving state. Validation is inferred through **prerecorded data** in virtual machines, enabling offline testing against historical or simulated scenarios. The **Air Quality Management** system prioritizes **model-driven engineering** with **AutomationML**, suggesting structured validation via **runtime visualization** and **prediction accuracy metrics**, though no explicit uncertainty quantification or error correction mechanisms are described. For the **gantry crane**, the ad-hoc approach lacks documented fidelity requirements or validation methods, relying instead on **containerized deployment** for reproducibility. Quality assurance processes are not explicitly detailed, but the use of **commercial cloud tools (Azure)** and **standardized protocols (AutomationML)** in the Air Quality exemplar implies adherence to industry best practices for data integrity and model traceability."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The **Digital Twin’s Technical Connection** infrastructure is designed for low-latency, high-reliability communication between components. Key details include:
  - **Communication Protocols**:
    - **MQTT** (via the **MQTT Broker**) for lightweight, event-driven signaling between services (e.g., **Trajectory Generator** → **Control Application**).
    - **TCP/IP** or **serial protocols** for direct hardware-software communication (e.g., **Physical Crane Interface** ↔ crane controllers).
    - **TimescaleDB’s internal protocols** (e.g., PostgreSQL-based) for structured data storage/retrieval.
  - **Network Topology and Architecture**:
    - **Star topology** centered around the **MQTT Broker**, with services (e.g., **Dashboard**, **Simulation Service**) subscribing/publishing to topics.
    - **Local-area network (LAN)** for on-premise deployment, given the lab-scale scope.
  - **Bandwidth and Latency Requirements**:
    - **Low-latency (<100 ms)** for real-time trajectory validation (e.g., **Continuous Validation Service**).
    - **Moderate bandwidth** (~1–10 Mbps) to handle time-series data (e.g., sensor streams, trajectory logs) in **TimescaleDB**.
  - **Reliability and Redundancy Mechanisms**:
    - **MQTT QoS levels** (e.g., QoS 1 for at-least-once delivery of critical commands).
    - **Database replication** in **TimescaleDB** (not explicitly stated but inferred for fault tolerance).
    - **Fallback to manual operation** if digital twin services fail (as the physical crane can operate independently).
  - **Security Protocols**:
    - Not explicitly detailed, but likely includes:
      - **Authentication**: Service-level credentials for MQTT topics (e.g., username/password or TLS client certificates).
      - **Encryption**: TLS for MQTT/TCP communication if deployed in a shared network.
      - **Access Control**: Role-based permissions (e.g., **Operator** vs. **Researcher** access to the **Dashboard**)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The **Digital Twin’s Hosting and Deployment** infrastructure is tailored for a **lab-scale, on-premise** environment with the following specifics:
  - **Hosting Platform**: **On-premise** (local server or workstation), given the system’s small scale and lack of cloud references. The **TimescaleDB** database and **MQTT Broker** are likely co-located with the physical crane for minimal latency.
  - **Computational and Storage Requirements**:
    - **CPU/GPU**: Moderate (e.g., multi-core x86 or embedded GPU) to handle real-time trajectory generation and simulation.
    - **RAM**: ~4–16 GB for running Python services (e.g., **Trajectory Generator**, **Simulation Service**) concurrently.
    - **Storage**: **TimescaleDB** (PostgreSQL-based) requires SSD storage for time-series data, with capacity scaling based on logging frequency (e.g., 100 Hz sensor data → ~10 GB/month).
  - **Scalability Mechanisms**:
    - **Vertical scaling** (e.g., upgrading the host machine) for increased data throughput or simulation complexity.
    - **Modular service design** (e.g., **Trajectory Generator** as a standalone container) allows for future horizontal scaling if deployed in a distributed environment.
  - **Deployment Models Supported**:
    - **Single-node deployment** (all services on one machine) for simplicity.
    - **Containerized deployment** (implied by the C4 model’s container abstraction) using tools like Docker (though not explicitly mentioned).
  - **Availability/Reliability Assurance**:
    - **High availability** achieved via:
      - **Redundant MQTT Broker** (not stated but inferred for critical systems).
      - **Periodic backups** of **TimescaleDB** data.
      - **Graceful degradation** (e.g., switching to manual control if the **Dashboard** fails)."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration in the Digital Twin exemplars is **limited to domain-specific, lightweight interoperability** without standardized enterprise integration patterns. GreenhouseDT relies on **InfluxDB (time-series database)** and **ActiveMQ (message broker)** for internal data exchange, while Air Quality Management uses **AutomationML** for digital twin modeling and **Microsoft Azure tools** for cloud-based pipeline execution. Both exemplars lack explicit mention of **external system dependencies** (e.g., ERP, MES) or **cross-Digital Twin interoperability standards** (e.g., OPC UA, FIWARE). The lab-scale gantry crane’s architecture (C4 Model) implies **modular integration** but provides no details on protocols or external system linkages. The ad-hoc approach prioritizes **self-contained deployment** over broad horizontal scalability."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin exemplars adhere to the following **standards and interoperability frameworks**:
  - **AutomationML**: Used in the **Air Quality Management exemplar** for structured digital twin modeling, ensuring compatibility with industrial automation standards.
  - **Industry-Specific Domains**:
    - **Agricultural**: GreenhouseDT aligns with low-cost IoT/agricultural monitoring standards (e.g., sensor data formats, time-series databases like **InfluxDB**).
    - **Construction/Indoor Air Quality**: The Air Quality Management exemplar targets **virus spread prevention**, implying compliance with **ASHRAE 62.1** (ventilation standards) or similar health/safety regulations, though not explicitly stated.
    - **Logistics/Cyber-Physical Systems**: The gantry crane exemplar (logistics domain) lacks explicit standardization but uses **C4 Model** for architecture visualization, a de facto standard for software/system modeling.
  - **Cloud/Interoperability**:
    - **Microsoft Azure** tools (Air Quality Management) suggest alignment with **Microsoft’s interoperability standards** (e.g., REST APIs, Azure IoT Hub).
    - **Message Brokers**: GreenhouseDT uses **ActiveMQ**, a standard for **JMS/AMQP-based messaging**, ensuring cross-platform communication.
  - **Certification**: No explicit certification requirements (e.g., ISO 9001, IEC 62443) are mentioned. The exemplars prioritize **ad-hoc reproducibility** over formal certification."
]
